title: Full 1.6 -> 1.7 migration of a LiveView template
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/pre_1_7_user_list.ex is a Phoenix 1.6 LiveView. Produce lib/my_app_web/live/user_list_live.ex that migrates it to Phoenix 1.7+: every route becomes ~p, every <%= live_patch/live_redirect/live_link %> becomes <.link patch/navigate=>, every <%= for %>/<%= if %> becomes :for/:if, ~L becomes ~H, push_redirect becomes push_navigate, and the LiveView loads its users in handle_params/3 (not mount/3). Preserve module name MyAppWeb.UserListLive.
tier_rationale: Multi-step migration across several deprecated idioms. Sonnet typically converts routes but misses one of: ~L->~H, push_redirect, or the handle_params move.
research_citation: fly.io Migrating to Verified Routes + fly.io Migrating to LiveView v0.18 + oliver-kriska plugin iron laws
